title: digitalis canariensis
intro: Digitalis canariensis is a flowering plant species in the foxglove family (Scrophulariaceae) native to the Canary Islands. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, particularly digitalis glycosides, which have been used to treat heart conditions such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure. The health benefits of Digitalis canariensis include improved cardiovascular function, increased cardiac output, and enhanced overall heart health. The herbal preparation of Digitalis canariensis is typically obtained through the extraction of its leaves, which can be used to create tinctures, capsules, or teas for medicinal purposes.
